values.title: TechGuard IT Solutions Homepage
values.hero_title: Secure IT Solutions for Growing Businesses
values.hero_description: Protect your business with enterprise-grade IT services. From cybersecurity to cloud migration, we keep your technology running so you can focus on growth.
values.features_subtitle: Comprehensive managed IT services designed to protect, optimize, and scale your infrastructure.
values.cta_description: Schedule a free IT assessment and discover how TechGuard can strengthen your security posture and streamline your operations.

values.title: Managed IT Services
values.body:
Our managed IT services provide comprehensive technology management so your team can focus on core business objectives. We handle everything from network administration to software updates and hardware lifecycle management.

What's Included

  • Network monitoring and management
  • Server administration and maintenance
  • Desktop and laptop support
  • Software patch management
  • Vendor management and procurement

Service Levels

Choose from Basic, Professional, or Enterprise tiers with guaranteed response times and dedicated technical account managers.

values.title: Cybersecurity Solutions
values.body:
Protect your organization from evolving cyber threats with our comprehensive security solutions. We implement defense-in-depth strategies tailored to your risk profile and compliance requirements.

Security Services

  • Vulnerability assessments and penetration testing
  • Security information and event management (SIEM)
  • Email security and anti-phishing
  • Endpoint detection and response (EDR)
  • Security awareness training

values.title: Cloud Migration & Management
values.body:
Accelerate your digital transformation with strategic cloud migration services. We assess, plan, and execute migrations to AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud with minimal disruption.

Our Approach

  • Cloud readiness assessment
  • Architecture design and optimization
  • Data migration and validation
  • Hybrid cloud solutions
  • Ongoing cloud cost optimization

values.title: Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity
values.body:
Ensure your business can recover from any disruption with our disaster recovery and business continuity planning services. We design, implement, and test recovery strategies that meet your RPO and RTO requirements.

DR Services

  • Business impact analysis
  • Recovery strategy design
  • Automated backup solutions
  • Regular DR testing and validation
  • Incident response planning

values.title: Regional Healthcare Network Security Overhaul
values.body:
A regional healthcare network with 12 clinics was struggling with outdated security infrastructure and HIPAA compliance gaps. Our team conducted a comprehensive security audit, implemented a zero-trust architecture, and deployed SIEM monitoring across all locations.

The Challenge

The client faced frequent phishing attempts, lacked centralized logging, and had inconsistent security policies across clinics.

Our Solution

We deployed a unified security platform with EDR, email filtering, multi-factor authentication, and 24/7 SOC monitoring. Staff received security awareness training to reduce human error risk.
values.results: 99.9% uptime, zero breaches in 18 months, full HIPAA compliance

values.title: Precision Manufacturing Cloud Transformation
values.body:
A precision manufacturing company with 200 employees needed to modernize their on-premise infrastructure to support rapid growth and remote work. We led a phased cloud migration to Azure, migrating critical ERP and CAD systems while maintaining production uptime.

Results

The migration reduced infrastructure costs by 40%, enabled secure remote access for engineers, and improved system performance by 3x.
values.results: 40% cost reduction, 3x performance improvement, 100% uptime during migration

values.title: Atlantic Financial Group Compliance & DR
values.body:
A mid-sized financial services firm required SOC 2 Type II compliance and a robust disaster recovery solution to meet regulatory requirements and client expectations.

Implementation

We designed a compliant infrastructure, implemented automated backup with 15-minute RPO, and established a tested DR plan that ensures 4-hour RTO for critical systems.
values.results: SOC 2 Type II certified, 15-minute RPO, 4-hour RTO achieved

values.title: David Park
values.body:
David founded TechGuard IT Solutions in 2015 after 15 years in enterprise IT leadership. He leads strategic direction and ensures every client receives personalized attention and world-class service.

Under his leadership, TechGuard has grown from a 3-person consultancy to a 45-person managed services provider serving over 100 businesses across the region.

values.title: Rachel Foster
values.body: Rachel leads our cybersecurity division, bringing over a decade of experience in threat intelligence, incident response, and security architecture. She has protected organizations in healthcare, finance, and government sectors.

values.title: James Wright
values.body: James oversees all cloud infrastructure and managed services operations. He architects scalable solutions across AWS, Azure, and GCP, and ensures SLA commitments are consistently met.
values.certifications: AWS Solutions Architect Pro, Azure Solutions Architect, GCP Professional

values.title: About TechGuard IT Solutions
values.body:
Founded in 2015, TechGuard IT Solutions is a trusted managed services provider serving over 100 businesses across the region. We combine deep technical expertise with a client-first approach to deliver IT solutions that drive business growth.

Our Values

  • Security First - Every solution we build prioritizes the protection of your data and systems
  • Transparency - Clear communication, honest assessments, and no hidden costs
  • Partnership - We succeed when our clients succeed, building long-term relationships

Certifications

Our team holds certifications from Microsoft, AWS, Cisco, CompTIA, and (ISC)2. We maintain SOC 2 compliance and follow ITIL best practices.

values.title: Careers at TechGuard
values.body:
Join a team of passionate IT professionals dedicated to protecting and empowering businesses through technology. We offer competitive compensation, continuous learning opportunities, and a collaborative work environment.

Why TechGuard?

  • Certification sponsorship and training budget
  • Flexible remote and hybrid work options
  • Quarterly team events and annual conference attendance
  • Health, dental, and vision coverage

Open Positions

Check our careers page regularly for new opportunities in security, cloud engineering, help desk, and project management.
